item.title: FixVare MBOX to EML Converter [File Management]
item.itunes:title: FixVare MBOX to EML Converter [File Management]
item.itunes:author: johnnik
item.itunes:summary:
FixVare MBOX to EML Converter
(File Management)
The FixVare MBOX to EML Converter is a straightforward tool that converts large quantities of MBOX files from Mozilla Thunderbird, Eudora, Entourage Mac, Apple Mac, and other email clients into the EML file format. These files can be imported into Outlook Express, Windows Live Mail, and other email clients that support EML. Users with minimal or no experience in email conversion tools can also use this tool. The setup process is simple and effortless, as there are no unusual settings, program requirements, or third-party components. The MBOX to EML Converter interface provides a detailed description of all available options in a well-organized standard window. The tool allows bulk processing, which allows for the continuous conversion of numerous MBOX files into multiple EML items. It is capable of maintaining the data structure and email properties during the conversion process. It supports all editions of Windows OS such as 34-bit OS and 64-bit OS. However, user can check this software on their own by viewing a free demo of 25 MBOX files from each folder.

[read more]
item.description:
FixVare MBOX to EML Converter
(File Management)
The FixVare MBOX to EML Converter is a straightforward tool that converts large quantities of MBOX files from Mozilla Thunderbird, Eudora, Entourage Mac, Apple Mac, and other email clients into the EML file format. These files can be imported into Outlook Express, Windows Live Mail, and other email clients that support EML. Users with minimal or no experience in email conversion tools can also use this tool. The setup process is simple and effortless, as there are no unusual settings, program requirements, or third-party components. The MBOX to EML Converter interface provides a detailed description of all available options in a well-organized standard window. The tool allows bulk processing, which allows for the continuous conversion of numerous MBOX files into multiple EML items. It is capable of maintaining the data structure and email properties during the conversion process. It supports all editions of Windows OS such as 34-bit OS and 64-bit OS. However, user can check this software on their own by viewing a free demo of 25 MBOX files from each folder.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
FixVare MBOX to EML Converter
(File Management)
The FixVare MBOX to EML Converter is a straightforward tool that converts large quantities of MBOX files from Mozilla Thunderbird, Eudora, Entourage Mac, Apple Mac, and other email clients into the EML file format. These files can be imported into Outlook Express, Windows Live Mail, and other email clients that support EML. Users with minimal or no experience in email conversion tools can also use this tool. The setup process is simple and effortless, as there are no unusual settings, program requirements, or third-party components. The MBOX to EML Converter interface provides a detailed description of all available options in a well-organized standard window. The tool allows bulk processing, which allows for the continuous conversion of numerous MBOX files into multiple EML items. It is capable of maintaining the data structure and email properties during the conversion process. It supports all editions of Windows OS such as 34-bit OS and 64-bit OS. However, user can check this software on their own by viewing a free demo of 25 MBOX files from each folder.

[read more]

item.title: Bar code Label Maker [Financial]
item.itunes:title: Bar code Label Maker [Financial]
item.itunes:author: employeesalarysoft
item.itunes:summary:
Bar code Label Maker
(Financial)
Highly effective Bar code Label Maker utility from www.employeesalarysoftware.com provides advanced color and background settings for designing colorful identification cards with users recent photo. Easy to use Business barcode generator application create printable and scan able bar code graphics of any shape, size and color with support to all printers and scanners.

[read more]

item.title: Employee Salary Software [Financial]
item.itunes:title: Employee Salary Software [Financial]
item.itunes:author: employeesalarysoft
item.itunes:summary:
Employee Salary Software
(Financial)
Employee Salary Software keep details of all paid and unpaid leaves of an employee including casual leave, sick leave, martial leave etc. install Employee scheduling utility from www.employeesalarysoftware.com which provides data connectivity that helps to administrator to connect database of selected company in very simple way within few mouse clicks.

Order Mobile Bulk SMS
(Chat & Messenging)

item.title: SIM Card Data Restore Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: SIM Card Data Restore Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: mobiledatarecovery1
item.itunes:summary:
SIM Card Data Restore Program
(Utilities)
Sim card data regain tool revive lost number. Affordable SIM Card Data Restore Program retrieve lost inbox messages. SIM Card Data Restore Program is specially designed to revive all those data which were lost from your sim card like sms, ICCC number, service provider number, call log details and many more. Have you lost your precious office colleague numbers from phone book due to virus attack? Then SIM Card Data Restore Program is perfect tool for you as it offers complete and comprehensive recovery of deleted and missed contact numbers and messages. Excellent quality SIM Card Data Restore program enables you to repair deleted and damaged files without affecting other saved data. Recovery program facilitates professionals as well as beginners to rescue deleted precious contact numbers, call log details, inbox, outbox, sent items and drafts messages and many more from inaccessible sim card.

[read more]

Mobile Phone Data Recovery Software

Revive mp3/mp4 songs using retrieval tool. Books Accounting Software
(Financial)
Site www.employeesalarysoftware.com reliefs Books Accounting Software that is beneficial for all kinds of companies and organizations to create and track their whole organizational information. Purchase order data management utility has been developed to reduce paper work and organize your company information to increase business sales. Financial management application automatically calculates the tax amount on all taxable items.

item.title: Arch-Systemtool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Arch-Systemtool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Arch-Systemtool
(Utilities)
i present my systemtool i created for arch it has many features
it combines alot of my apps into one
you will need qt6 installed

more coming soon
and some things are still being improved
this has been built from a long time of updating thats why the version is so high
originally this was bash

to run the application simply execute the run.sh
you can use these on my systems if you have installed one of my .isos
simply place files in cpp folder please my next update of .isos wont have this folder


v2.0.14
you can change theme
you can update
change mirrors
convert appimages
clear cache
create a backup with penguins eggs installed
lock unlock linux-zen kernel

[read more]
item.description:

i present my systemtool i created for arch it has many features

this has been built from a long time of updating thats why the version is so high

simply place files in cpp folder please my next update of .isos wont have this folder

i present my systemtool i created for arch it has many features
it combines alot of my apps into one
you will need qt6 installed

this has been built from a long time of updating thats why the version is so high
originally this was bash

to run the application simply execute the run.sh
you can use these on my systems if you have installed one of my .isos
simply place files in cpp folder please my next update of .isos wont have this folder


v2.0.14
you can change theme
you can update
change mirrors
convert appimages
clear cache
create a backup with penguins eggs installed
lock unlock linux-zen kernel

[read more]
